summary: Project with Pinterest icon integration and product promotion features including an image and a 'Lookout' button linking to an Amazon product.
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Woman wearing a pink printed kurta suit with dupatta, holding white flowers, on a plain light background (kurta-suit-pink.dim_600x800.jpg)

existing_features.title: Add a new promotional section to the ProductBrowse page that displays the uploaded pink kurta suit image (stored as frontend/public/assets/generated/kurta-suit-pink.dim_600x800.jpg) followed immediately below by a 'Lookout' button. Clicking the button must open https://amzn.to/4rGaVQa in a new tab.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add an image with a 'Lookout' button below it that redirects to https://amzn.to/4rGaVQa
